label: Duke Energy Indiana
notes: Duke Energy Indiana (investor-owned) — serves ~900k customers across central/northern IN. Customer portal at duke-energy.com, bespoke login. Adapter needs a live login to reverse-engineer. Manual PDF upload meanwhile.

label: Northern Indiana Public Service Company (NIPSCO)
notes: NIPSCO (NiSource investor-owned utility) — serves ~470k electric customers in northern IN. Customer portal at nipsco.com, bespoke login. Adapter needs a live login. Manual PDF upload meanwhile.
